title: ECI Cracks Down on Poll Inducements: Over Rs 650 Crore Worth of Illegal Cash, Liquor, Drugs, Freebies Seized Nationwide
description: In a major push to ensure free and fair elections, the Election Commission of India (ECI) has seized illegal items worth more than Rs 650 crore so far this election season, including cash, liquor, drugs, precious metals, and other inducements aimed at influencing voters.
